About Akaid
I've been where you are.

I'm Akaid — a CSE student at BUET, one of the most competitive engineering institutions in Bangladesh. I scored GPA 5 in both SSC and HSC, earning the Talent Pool Scholarship both times. I sat for the same exams you're preparing for right now, and I know exactly which concepts are tested, which problems trip students up, and how to explain physics so it genuinely clicks.

My approach is simple: understand first, memorize later. No shortcuts that crumble under exam pressure — just real understanding that lasts.
